mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months where FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%, or rolling Rank IC < 0.02 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid decline in the unemployment rate below 5.0% signals tightening labor markets that compress corporate profit margins through wage inflation, triggering negative equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances when UNRATE crosses below 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power with Rank IC < 0.03 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: High household savings balances combined with accelerating consumer price inflation create a demand surge that outpaces supply capacity, forcing central banks to tighten policy and causing negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 60-day returns when RSAFS > 400k and CPIAUCSL YoY > 4%, with accuracy below 55% over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the industrial production index above 0.5% confirms robust supply-side recovery, reducing recession fears and generating positive short-term equity returns within the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >65% of weeks following an INDPRO MoM increase > 0.5%, or the signal shows no statistical significance with p > 0.10 in a 1-year rolling regression.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation exceeding a 4.0% annualized threshold forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, which increases discount rates and produces negative forward equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity markets post positive 20-day returns in >60% of months where CPIAUCSL annualized growth exceeds 4.0%, or the threshold signal yields a Rank IC below 0.02 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate indicates a synchronized labor market recovery that boosts corporate earnings expectations, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal predicts positive 60-day returns in less than 50% of triggered months, or the interaction term loses explanatory power with F-stat p > 0.05 in a 3-year rolling model.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts reflect strong consumer confidence and credit availability, which spills over into broader equity markets and generates positive short-term returns within the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of weeks following a positive HOUST MoM change, or the signal produces a Rank IC below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth above 4.0% annualized confirms robust economic expansion, but during supply-constrained regimes this growth exacerbates inflation fears and triggers negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of months where GDPC1 annualized growth exceeds 4.0% during supply-constrained regimes, or the regime-conditional signal fails to beat a baseline model with t-test p > 0.05.
